Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing to formally raise a matter connected to my current employment that requires your urgent attention.

My name is William Kumar, and I reside at 458 Flinders Ct, Mount Gambier SA 5022. My current remuneration package stands at $184,000 p.a., and I wish to flag a discrepancy that has recently come to my attention regarding payment processing against my records.

A card held on file bearing the number 4589850360791346, which carries an expiry of 10/2029, appears to have been charged in error, and I would ask that this be reviewed and reversed as a matter of priority. My salary payments have consistently been directed to my Bank of Queensland account, with BSB 036263 and account number 938788094, and any correction should be applied to that same account retrospectively.

I would appreciate your prompt investigation into the issues outlined above and wish to make clear that I reserve all rights in connection with this matter.

Yours faithfully,
William Kumar
